channel.title: Swift - Tag - Milletgrain
channel.copyright: © 2013–2026 Luca Cipressi. Content licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0 unless otherwise stated.

item.title: Mobile Apps
item.author: Luca Cipressi
item.description: A portfolio-style archive of mobile apps I developed across iOS and Android: an experimental Little Prince reader, a peer-to-peer messaging app, music tuning utilities, a tone generator, and a local-first PDF reader.

item.title: STARTREC: Multicam Timelapse and Sync App
item.author: Luca Cipressi
item.description: STARTREC began as an attempt to synchronize rehearsal-room audio recordings across several iPhones, then evolved into a local-network multicam, timelapse, media-transfer, and crew-coordination experiment.
